/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libggml.so.0 -o ../../../bin/libggml.so.0.9.4 "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ntdpkg/Documents/hkvi/phan_tich_va_thiet_ke_phan_mem/Dean1/real/merged/scratch/build_llama_linux/bin: -ldl ../../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.4 ../../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.4
